phrases.⚠ 胜率未达80%，暂不可计算胜负: ⚠ Win rate is below 80%, scoring is unavailable
phrases.⚡ 自由落子时间结束，AI 开始读盘: ⚡ Free placement ended. The AI is reading the board.
phrases.🎓 代练上号接管中，请等待强化 AI 完成代打。: 🎓 Coach is controlling this phase. Wait for the boosted AI to finish.
phrases.🎓 代练上号接管中，暂时不能指定傀儡点。: 🎓 Coach is controlling this phase. Puppet targeting is paused.
phrases.🎭 傀儡术：先点出 AI 的下一手落点；你随后正常落子: 🎭 Puppet: choose the AI's next forced point first, then play your own move.
phrases.🎭 这个点已被傀儡术预留给 AI: 🎭 This point is reserved for the AI by Puppet.
phrases.🚫 四道封印已设定！: 🚫 Four seals are now in place!
phrases.闯关：测试版默认执白，按当前关卡自动套用让子与卡组限制。: Challenge: beta mode defaults you to White and applies stage handicap and loadout rules automatically.
phrases.当前卡牌效果禁用了悔棋: Undo is disabled by the current card
phrases.当前玩法：大招对战。固定 19×19，用普通规则开局，你与 AI 各自带一张大招: Current variant: Ultimate Duel. Fixed at 19x19 with standard rules, one ultimate card per side, and a 20-move showdown.
phrases.当前玩法：单人抽卡。固定 19×19，只有你带 Rogue 卡，保留颜色、贴目、: Current variant: Solo Draft. Fixed at 19x19. Only you use a Rogue card, while color, komi, rank, style, and time settings stay available.
phrases.当前玩法：双人抽卡。固定 19×19，你先选 1 张 Rogue 卡，AI 也会: Current variant: Dual Draft. Fixed at 19x19. You pick 1 Rogue card, and the AI also receives 1 card from the restricted pool.
phrases.对局：可手选黑白或随机猜先；选择让子时会自动把贴目设为 0，仍可手动改回 6.5: Game: choose Black, White, or random color; handicap auto-sets komi to 0, but you can still change it back to 6.5 or 7.5.
phrases.对局开始后显示胜率曲线: Winrate history appears after analysis starts.
phrases.快速思考结束，轮到 AI 读盘: Quick Thinking ended. The AI is reading the board.
phrases.您确定要认输吗？: Are you sure you want to resign?
phrases.棋谱中未找到有效着法: No valid moves were found in the SGF
phrases.胜率需≥80%才可计算胜负: Win rate must reach 80% to score
phrases.双人：黑白双方均由玩家落子，可调整棋盘、贴目、让子与用时。: Two Players: both sides are human, with board size, komi, handicap, and timing controls.
phrases.双人对局开始 — 黑棋先行: Two-player game started — Black moves first
phrases.学习：黑白双方都由 AI 对弈，可分别调整黑棋与白棋的等级和棋风。: Study: both sides are AI, with separate rank and style controls for Black and White.
phrases.已通过第 1 关，进入第 2 关。你将执白并按让 2 子开局，同时再选 1 张卡: Stage 1 cleared. Start Stage 2 as White with a 2-stone handicap opening and one more card?
phrases.暂无进行中的对局，请点击「开始对弈」开始: No active game was found. Click Start Game to begin.
phrases.这里汇总 Rogue AI 的三种主玩法、闯关路线，以及所有 Rogue 强化卡: This index covers Rogue AI game variants, challenge runs, and the full effect list for Rogue and Ultimate cards.

wikiModes.title: Solo Draft
wikiModes.desc: You draft 1 Rogue card from 3 choices. The AI plays standard rules with no Rogue card of its own.

wikiModes.title: Dual Draft
wikiModes.desc: You pick 1 Rogue card from 3 choices, and the AI also receives 1 card from the restricted AI Rogue pool.

wikiModes.title: Ultimate Duel
wikiModes.desc: You and the AI each pick 1 ultimate card from 3 choices. The game resolves in a 20-move showdown.

wikiModes.title: Challenge
wikiModes.desc: Challenge mode layers card-pool restrictions, handicap, and refresh counts for staged runs.

tengen.name: Tengen
tengen.desc: For its first 3 moves, the AI is pulled toward the center and star points.

dice.name: Dice Roll
dice.desc: Each AI move has a 10% chance of being skipped entirely.

erosion.name: Erosion
erosion.desc: Every capture shifts komi by 4 points in the captor's favor.

puppet.name: Puppet
puppet.desc: Mark the AI's next forced point first. You play your move, then the AI must answer there (once per game).

seal.name: Seal
seal.desc: Mark 4 forbidden points the AI cannot touch for the whole game.

twin.name: Combo
twin.desc: Play two moves in a single turn once per game for a local follow-up.

nerf.name: Nerf
nerf.desc: Drop the AI by about 8 ranks, crush its search power to roughly 5%, and make its first 12 moves much more likely to mis-pick backup options.

komi_relief.name: Komi Cut
komi_relief.desc: Komi shifts 7 points in your favor.

time_press.name: Time Crunch
time_press.desc: Drop the AI by about 5 ranks, cap it at 0.10 seconds per move, and make its first 12 moves much more likely to misread under time pressure.

lowline.name: Low Sweep
lowline.desc: The AI hugs the 2nd–3rd lines for 6 moves.

suboptimal.name: Second Best
suboptimal.desc: For its first 8 moves, the AI is much more likely to choose weaker backup options.

mirror.name: Mirror
mirror.desc: 16% chance the AI mirrors your last move across the board.

slip.name: Butterfingers
slip.desc: 14% chance the AI slips to a straight-adjacent point.

blackhole.name: Black Hole
blackhole.desc: The central 13-point zone is off-limits to the AI for its first 6 moves.

exchange.name: Turn Steal
exchange.desc: Force the AI to pass — you keep playing (once per game).

fog.name: Fog of War
fog.desc: For the AI's first 11 moves, a drifting 3×3 no-go zone appears. After that, each turn blocks 2 random legal points.

gravity.name: Gravity Well
gravity.desc: The AI is pulled toward star points for 5 moves.

golden_corner.name: Golden Corner
golden_corner.desc: A random 4×4 corner is sealed off from the AI for its first 10 moves.

sansan.name: 3-3 Rush
sansan.desc: For its first 2 moves, the AI is forced to open on the four 3-3 points, then avoids corner 4×4 zones for 2 moves.

shadow.name: Shadow
shadow.desc: On its first 2 moves, the AI has a high chance to cling to its previous stone.

sprout.name: Sprout
sprout.desc: Each capture spawns a bonus friendly stone nearby.

joseki_ocd.name: Joseki OCD
joseki_ocd.desc: 7 target points appear. Hit any 4 of them to auto-fill the remaining 3 with your stones.

handicap_quest.name: Handicap Quest
handicap_quest.desc: Pass once to start; after every 8 moves you force an AI pass, up to 3 times.

god_hand.name: Hand of God
god_hand.desc: Step on a hidden diamond zone — 3 friendly stones burst into nearby empty points inside a 3×3 area.

sansan_trap.name: 3-3 Trap
sansan_trap.desc: Only if the opponent's very first move lands on any 3-3 point, you immediately gain 8 nearby counter-stones.

corner_helper.name: Corner Guard
corner_helper.desc: Each corner can trigger once. If any corner's 5×5 area has 4 of your stones, that corner gains 1 reinforcement.

sanrensei.name: Three Stars
sanrensei.desc: If your first 2 moves both land on star points, the game auto-fills a 3rd star point stone and adds 2 nearby support stones.

no_regret.name: No Regrets
no_regret.desc: Undo disabled — but each move has a 12% chance to add a free stone.

quickthink.name: Quick Think
quickthink.desc: Play within 3s to unlock a 1s bonus move window. Hints and undo are disabled while this card is active.

foolish_wisdom.name: Wise Fool
foolish_wisdom.desc: Form an ugly shape to sprout 2 bonus stones in the nearby 5×5 area.

five_in_row.name: Five in a Row
five_in_row.desc: This is Gomoku, not Go. Whenever your stones form exactly 5 in a row, it extends the ends if possible; blocked ends become nearby support stones, plus 4 extra support stones near the line.

coach_mode.name: Coach Login
coach_mode.desc: Active: a stronger AI plays the next 30 turns for you. If your winrate stays below 50% after that, it plays 10 extra turns.

capture_foul.name: Capture Foul
capture_foul.desc: When the opponent's single capture or running capture total reaches 4 stones, a foul triggers automatically. The offender loses 4 points, then the counter resets.

last_stand.name: Last Stand
last_stand.desc: Once per game, if your winrate drops below 26%, remove 1 enemy stone and add 1 friendly stone inside the last move's 3×3 area without landing on forbidden points.

chain.name: Chain Strike
chain.desc: Every move has a 65% chance to grant an extra turn.

proliferate.name: Infinite Bloom
proliferate.desc: After you play, 5 same-color stones bloom in a 5×5 zone.

double.name: Dual Blades
double.desc: Every turn becomes a 2-move combo, but the whole burst only counts as 1 move.

wildgrow.name: Wild Growth
wildgrow.desc: 4 of your stones spread outward into empty space.

rejection.name: Repulsion
rejection.desc: Enemy stones in the 5×5 zone are pushed away or destroyed.

territory.name: Absolute Zone
territory.desc: Create a 4-step forbidden barrier around your move.

shadow_clone.name: Shadow Clone
shadow_clone.desc: Create a mirrored stone now. One turn later, the original point and mirror point are forced into a full line even if either endpoint was removed.

plague.name: Plague
plague.desc: Convert every enemy stone in the 3×3 area to your color.

meteor.name: Meteor Strike
meteor.desc: Randomly obliterate 5 enemy stones anywhere on the board.

quantum.name: Quantum Surge
quantum.desc: 5 same-color stones materialize at random positions.

devour.name: Devour
devour.desc: Erase every enemy stone in the surrounding 5×5 area.

timewarp.name: Time Rift
timewarp.desc: 85% chance to erase the opponent's last 2 moves from existence.

blackout.name: Cataclysm
blackout.desc: Wipe all enemy stones in a cross pattern from your move.

magnet.name: Magnet Pull
magnet.desc: Your stones rush toward the point, crushing enemies in their path.

necro.name: Necromancy
necro.desc: Summon 3 friendly stones and convert 2 enemy stones.

wall.name: Great Wall
wall.desc: 60% chance to trigger. Fill an entire row or column with an impassable stone wall.

joseki_burst.name: Joseki Burst
joseki_burst.desc: Complete joseki points, then detonate 50 bonus stones.

god_hand.name: Hand of God
god_hand.desc: Trigger the hidden diamond — wipe enemies and flood the board with 50 stones.

corner_helper.name: Corner Fortress
corner_helper.desc: Each corner can trigger once. If a corner's 5×5 area has 2 of your stones, that corner's 8×8 boundary is filled and enemies inside are cleared.

sanrensei.name: Star Ignition
sanrensei.desc: Play your first 3 moves on star points to ignite star-point influence across the board.

quickthink.name: Speed Storm
quickthink.desc: Place unlimited stones for 5 seconds — then the AI reads the board. The whole burst counts as 1 move.

foolish_wisdom.name: Fool's Chain
foolish_wisdom.desc: Ugly-shape chain reaction spawns up to 20 stones until it stops.

five_in_row.name: Five in a Row Burst
five_in_row.desc: This is Gomoku, not Go. Whenever your stones form exactly 5 in a row, remove 30 enemy stones and drop 30 friendly stones across the board. This effect can chain.

capture_foul.name: Capture Foul
capture_foul.desc: Whenever the opponent captures or removes more than 5 stones (including card effects), the foul triggers with 100% certainty. The offender immediately loses 50 points, then the counter resets and can trigger again.

last_stand.name: Last Stand
last_stand.desc: If your winrate drops below 30%, clear 30 enemy stones and add 30 friendly stones across the entire board.
